generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and leave us vulnerable. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about protecting them. Look at how other nations handle threats and see the difference. We can't afford to be complacent. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
